title: ITI Jobs 2026 – ITI Trade Apprentice
org: ITI Trade Apprentice - One Year (under Apprentices Act, 1961)
shortInfo: MPEZ Recruitment 2026 aims to fill 150 vacancies for ITI Trade Apprentice posts. Eligible candidates with ITI Pass can apply online from 25-05-2026 to 25-06-2026 through the official MPEZ website, mpez.co.in.

basic_details.job_title: MPEZ ITI Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 150 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Madhya Pradesh Poorv Kshetra Vidyut Vitaran Company
basic_details.post_name: ITI Trade Apprentice - One Year (under Apprentices Act, 1961)
basic_details.short_information: MPEZ Recruitment 2026 aims to fill 150 vacancies for ITI Trade Apprentice posts. Eligible candidates with ITI Pass can apply online from 25-05-2026 to 25-06-2026 through the official MPEZ website, mpez.co.in.

application_fee.details: The official notification does not mention any application fee. Application is through the NAPS portal (https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/). Candidates should check the official notification and NAPS portal for any applicable portal charges or processing fees before applying.

age_limit.details: Candidates must be a minimum of 18 years as on 01-01-2026. Maximum age is 25 years for General (UR) candidates. Relaxation in upper age limit is applicable as per Government of India / State Government guidelines for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD candidates.

qualification.details: Class 10th (Dasvin) pass AND ITI certificate (NCVT / SCVT) in the relevant trade from a recognized institution. Trade-wise qualification: COPA trade – 1-year ITI (NCVT/SCVT); Stenographer Hindi – 1-year ITI (NCVT/SCVT); Electrician – 2-year ITI (NCVT/SCVT).

salary_details.salary: Rs. 10,560/- per month (COPA & Stenographer Hindi) | Rs. 11,040/- per month (Electrician) — no other allowances/benefits

how_to_apply: Valid Aadhaar number or other acceptable ID for NAPS portal registration
ITI Pass Certificate and Mark Sheet (NCVT/SCVT) in relevant trade
Valid mobile number and email ID for OTP and future communications
Bank account details (required for stipend disbursement on NAPS portal)
important_instructions: THIS IS NOT AN EMPLOYMENT IN MPEZ. This advertisement is for Apprenticeship Training only under Section 22(1) of the Apprentices Act, 1961. MPEZ is not liable to offer regular employment after training completion, nor shall any apprentice have any right to claim employment in MPEZ after the training period ends.

After completion of apprenticeship training, candidates must pass the exam conducted by the Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship, Government of India, as per Section 21(1) and (2) of the Apprentices Act, 1961, after which a National Apprenticeship Certificate will be issued.
These vacancies are only for M.P. Mool Niwasi (domicile) candidates. Non-M.P. candidates are not eligible.
Candidates can apply for only one trade. Multiple applications will lead to disqualification.

If at any stage of the selection process it is found that a candidate does not meet the eligibility criteria, has hidden information, or has given incorrect information, their candidature will be cancelled and legal action may be taken.
SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) and Divyang candidates must fill their category carefully — information once submitted cannot be changed under any circumstances.

The merit/seniority list prepared through this advertisement will be valid for one year from the date of announcement of first results. Vacancies arising during this period may also be filled from this merit list.
Selected apprentices are entitled to 13 days casual leave, 15 days medical leave, and weekly/national holidays during the training period.
Workmen's Compensation Act, 1923 will be applicable in case of accident during training.
MPEZ Jabalpur reserves the right to cancel, limit, or extend the selection process at any time without prior notice or reason.
If selection does not happen, no correspondence or inquiry from candidates will be entertained.
Selected apprentices will be posted at MPEZ offices under Jabalpur, Sagar, Rewa, and Shahdol zones.
OBC candidates belonging to the "Creamy Layer" are not entitled to reservation/relaxation; they must apply as General/UR.
Candidates wishing to make changes to their online application may do so via "Edit my profile" on the portal before the last date.
Applications submitted before 25-05-2026 or after 25-06-2026 will not be accepted under any circumstances.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for MPEZ ITI Apprentice 2026-27?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for MPEZ ITI Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27 is 25 June 2026 (11:59 PM).

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in MPEZ Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 150 ITI Trade Apprentice training seats have been announced.

faq.question: What is the qualification required for MPEZ ITI Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Class 10th and possess an ITI certificate (NCVT/SCVT) in the relevant trade.

faq.question: What is the age limit for MPEZ ITI Trade Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit is 18 to 25 years as on 01 January 2026, with relaxation for reserved categories.

faq.question: What is the stipend for MPEZ ITI Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive Rs. 10,560/- per month for COPA and Stenographer, and Rs. 11,040/- per month for Electrician.

faq.question: What is the selection process for MPEZ Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on merit (ITI marks), followed by document verification and medical examination. No written exam is conducted.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for MPEZ ITI Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification. Candidates should verify on the NAPS portal.

faq.question: Who can apply for MPEZ ITI Trade Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: Only Madhya Pradesh domicile candidates with a valid NAPS registration and required ITI qualification can apply.

faq.question: How to apply for MPEZ ITI Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online through the NAPS portal at https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in after completing their apprentice profile.

faq.question: Is MPEZ ITI Apprentice a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, this is a 1-year apprenticeship training program and does not guarantee permanent employment.

seo_tags: Madhya Pradesh Poorv Kshetra Vidyut Vitaran Company ITI Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026
